concerns.text: The unified condition converts time-series/tabular to text before LLM inference (FR-003). Translation fidelity is not validated—information loss in text representation could disadvantage Condition B by design, not architecture. This creates an unfair comparison where the result measures (architecture + translation quality) rather than architecture alone. Specify how translation quality will be validated or measure information loss.

The 20 multi-modal tasks are not clearly defined as naturally-occurring vs. artificially-constructed by combining independent datasets. If artificially constructed, the 'multi-modal' nature may not reflect real scientific problems, limiting external validity. Specify task construction methodology and justify generalizability to real multi-modal scientific workflows.

20 tasks for paired t-test is on the lower end for robust inference. Research.md acknowledges 'power limitation' but plan should explicitly frame results as exploratory and consider power analysis or effect size reporting as primary outcome rather than p-value threshold.

Model selection (TimeSeries-Transformer, TabPFN, distilled LLM) lacks justification for why these represent 'modality-specific expertise' vs. general models. TabPFN uses transformer architecture—clarify distinction between modality-specific and modality-optimized to support the scientific claim.
